observations.note: Lean orchestration pattern perfectly executed: command validates args, sets markers, invokes skill. 88% token reduction achieved with zero behavior change.
Progressive disclosure implemented correctly: reference file loaded on-demand by skill, not in command initialization. Protects normal /dev flow from resume overhead.
Zero forbidden patterns detected: no Bash for file operations, no implicit state assumptions, explicit Read() calls for all file I/O.
Context isolation compliance verified: resume-detection.md explicitly documents all state reads (checkpoint, story DoD, context files) with no implicit assumptions.
Reference file quality excellent: 7 use cases, 2 examples, complete error handling, success indicators, performance analysis. Well-structured for on-demand loading.
Minor documentation inconsistency: section heading capitalization differs between early and late sections. Line 303 shows 'Integration with implementing-stories Skill' vs title case earlier.
Minor: command comment (line 81) references '~80 lines' but actual is 83 lines. Update to exact value for precision.
